title: DOM elements with ARIA role should only have supported properties
description: ARIA properties, also known as "aria-* properties", are special attributes used in HTML to enhance the accessibility of web elements. They provide additional semantics to help assistive technologies, like screen readers, interpret the element. Roles, on the other hand, define what an element is or does in the context of a web page.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.
